entities:
BM25Retriever | PRODUCT | Keyword-based retriever class in axon.retrievers using the BM25Okapi algorithm
BM25Okapi | PRODUCT | BM25 implementation from the rank_bm25 library used for document scoring
rank_bm25 | PRODUCT | Python library providing the BM25Okapi algorithm for keyword retrieval
QueryRouterMixin | PRODUCT | Axon mixin class that uses BM25Retriever as part of the hybrid search pipeline
ThreadPoolExecutor | CONCEPT | Concurrent executor used to offload CPU-bound BM25 scoring off the async event loop
bm25_corpus.json | CONCEPT | On-disk JSON file storing the BM25Retriever document corpus persistently
lazy-rebuild | CONCEPT | Optimization pattern where the BM25 index is only rebuilt on the next search call after writes
relations:
BM25Retriever | uses | BM25Okapi | BM25Retriever uses BM25Okapi from rank_bm25 to score documents against queries | 9
BM25Retriever | depends_on | rank_bm25 | rank_bm25 is a required dependency providing the BM25Okapi implementation | 9
QueryRouterMixin | depends_on | BM25Retriever | QueryRouterMixin uses BM25Retriever for the keyword component of hybrid search | 8
BM25Retriever | persists_to | bm25_corpus.json | BM25Retriever writes and reads its corpus from bm25_corpus.json on disk | 7
BM25Retriever | implements | lazy-rebuild | BM25Retriever defers index rebuild to first search after writes to avoid O(N-squared) ingest cost | 8
QueryRouterMixin | offloads_via | ThreadPoolExecutor | QueryRouterMixin runs BM25 scoring in a ThreadPoolExecutor to avoid blocking the async event loop | 8
